{{Quote|Gravity's silhouette remains, but the star and all the planets, disappeared they have. How can this be?|Yoda|<ref name="Episode 2">{{Film|II}}</ref>}}
'''Talita''' was the twelfth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kamino system/Legends|Kamino system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by six [[Moon/Legends|moons]].{{Planet-stub}}
